name: drag-out-of-window
_notes: Simulates the user dragging the cursor out of the OS window mid-turn. The browser fires `lostpointercapture`; PR #13 routes that through `hardCancelDrag` which must emit a `drag-end` telemetry event with `{canceled: true, reason: 'lostpointercapture'}` synchronously. Pre-fix, this event was either missing or had `canceled` unset, and a stale-dragPoint settle produced a visible pop on the next gesture.

assertions.description: hardCancelDrag emits drag-end{canceled, reason} within 100ms of the lostpointercapture event
